HomePage.title: Master your technical interviews with AI
HomePage.subtitle: The ultimate interview simulator for software engineers. Practice coding, architecture, and soft skills.
HomePage.feature1Desc: Dynamic scenarios tailored to your tech stack. From algorithms to system design.
HomePage.feature2Desc: Instant analysis of Big O, readability, and design patterns using advanced language models.
HomePage.feature3Desc: Real-time time pressure and anxiety tracking via voice analysis and typing patterns.
HomePage.archDesc: You don't just solve problems, you design global-scale solutions. Practice diagramming and technical justification of complex infrastructures.
HomePage.statsDesc: Our users have been hired by the world's most disruptive companies thanks to our surgical preparation.

SessionConfig.title: Create New Session
SessionConfig.subtitle: Configure your practice environment and start improving your skills with our AI-assisted interview engine.
SessionConfig.techAreaDesc: Choose the technology or technical area you want to focus on for this practice session.
SessionConfig.difficultyDesc: Define the difficulty of the questions and the technical rigor expected during the simulation.
SessionConfig.languageDesc: Select the interview language. This will affect both the questions and the evaluation.
SessionConfig.modeDesc: Choose the session format: a quick technical quiz or a complete immersive experience.
